description: Inventory active and inactive Claude source surfaces before any migration (--scan-only, read-only).
rules: lists instruction files, skills, command sources, and subagents found under SOURCE
usage: Set SOURCE (a Claude source root, optionally containing global/ + project/ subdirs). Output: scan.txt.
limitation: Read-only inventory; writes nothing to the Codex target. The vendored CLI imports tomllib and needs Python 3.11+ to run; on older Python it degrades to an empty inventory.
